# RadioLedger
> The open-source ledger for radio amateurs

## About
RadioLedger is an open-source, self-hostable ham radio logging platform.
Run it yourself with Docker Compose.
License: AGPLv3.

## Docs
- https://docs.radioledger.app/getting-started/
- https://docs.radioledger.app/self-hosting/
- https://docs.radioledger.app/api-reference/
- https://docs.radioledger.app/adif-import-export/
- https://docs.radioledger.app/desktop-client/
- https://docs.radioledger.app/pota-sota/
- https://docs.radioledger.app/federation/

## API
Base URL (self-hosted default): http://localhost:8080/v1
Base URL (self-hosted): http://localhost:8080/v1
Authentication: Bearer token (API key or JWT)
